parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT specialty
FROM public.doctors
WHERE clinic_id = $1
  AND active = true
ORDER BY specialty;

UPDATE public.conversations
SET state = $1,
    messages = messages || jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('specialties', $2::text)),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE clinic_id = $3
  AND patient_id = $4;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $('Trigger do workflow principal').first().json.fromNumber, text: $('Formatar lista de especialidades').first().json.responseText }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT id, name, specialty
FROM public.doctors
WHERE clinic_id = $1
  AND specialty = $2
  AND active = true
ORDER BY name;

UPDATE public.conversations
SET state = 'SCHEDULING_SLOT',
    messages = messages || jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(
      'selected_specialty', $1,
      'doctors', $2::text
    )),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE clinic_id = $3
  AND patient_id = $4;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $('Trigger do workflow principal').first().json.fromNumber, text: $('Formatar lista de médicos').first().json.responseText }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT scheduled_at FROM public.appointments WHERE doctor_id = $1 AND scheduled_at >= NOW() AND status = 'scheduled';

nodes.name: Buscar Agendamentos DB
nodes.notes: Busca horários ocupados diretamente na tabela appointments do banco de dados local (PostgreSQL).

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.conversations
SET state = 'SCHEDULING_CONFIRM',
    messages = messages || jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(
      'doctor_id', $1,
      'doctor_name', $2,
      'allSlots', $3::text,
      'slotOffset', '0'
    )),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE clinic_id = $4
  AND patient_id = $5;

options.queryReplacement: {{ $('Calcular slots disponíveis').first().json.doctor_id }}, {{ $('Calcular slots disponíveis').first().json.doctor_name }}, {{ JSON.stringify($('Calcular slots disponíveis').first().json.allSlots) }}, {{ $('Calcular slots disponíveis').first().json.clinic_id }}, {{ $('Calcular slots disponíveis').first().json.patient_id }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $('Trigger do workflow principal').first().json.fromNumber, text: $('Calcular slots disponíveis').first().json.responseText }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.appointments (clinic_id, patient_id, doctor_id, scheduled_at, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'scheduled') RETURNING id, scheduled_at;

UPDATE public.conversations
SET state = 'MENU', messages = '[]'::jsonb, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE clinic_id = $1
  AND patient_id = $2;

options.queryReplacement: {{ $('Processar escolha de slot').first().json.clinic_id }}, {{ $('Processar escolha de slot').first().json.patient_id }}

parameters.query: UPDATE public.conversations SET state = 'MENU', messages = '[]'::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() WHERE clinic_id = $1 AND patient_id = $2;

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.conversations
SET messages = (
  SELECT jsonb_agg(
    CASE WHEN (elem->>'slotOffset') IS NOT NULL
      THEN jsonb_set(elem, '{slotOffset}', to_jsonb($1::text))
      ELSE elem
    END
  )
  FROM jsonb_array_elements(messages) AS elem
),
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE clinic_id = $2
  AND patient_id = $3;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $('Processar escolha de slot').first().json.fromNumber, text: $('Processar escolha de slot').first().json.nextSlotsText }) }}
